titleStmt.title: A hymn to Ninŋišzida (Ninŋišzida C) -- an English prose translation

publicationStmt.distributor: The Electronic Text Corpus of Sumerian Literature

address.addrLine: The Oriental Institute, University of Oxford, Pusey Lane, Oxford OX1 2LE, UK, email etcsl@orinst.ox.ac.uk, http://etcsl.orinst.ox.ac.uk

seriesStmt.p: The Electronic Text Corpus of Sumerian Literature aims to make accessible over 400 literary works composed in the Sumerian language in ancient Mesopotamia during the late third and early second millennia BC. The works are in Sumerian composite transliteration and English prose translation with bibliographical information on each composition.

sourceDesc.p: Sources are listed in the header of the composite text

lg.p: …… to you. …… a flood-wave in the river, sweeping over everything like a destructive flood. My king, from your ……. King, from your birth you have …… in abundance. Ninŋišzida, your praise is sweet …….

Lord Ninŋišzida, ……
Hero, …… beloved of holy An, …… born in the shining great mountains, lord …… with sparkling eyes, with the attractiveness of a young man, great hero, the king's right arm on the battlefield, Lord Ninŋišzida, your praise is sweet. They praise you in song.

Hero, as you wander on the earth, Ninŋišzida, beloved of An, through you the early flood occurs, and Enki rejoices at you. Through you fine grains are in the fields, and …… rejoices at you. …… head held high, Lord Ninŋišzida. You ……, Lord Ninŋišzida. You extend ……, and you stretch out your claws. Lord Ninŋišzida, your praise is sweet, …….

…… he has poured his good seed. Enlil says Hail! to Ninŋišzida. He makes known ……, and creates it for you in the Land. ……, born like ……. He looks at your joyful …… Lord Ninŋišzida, your praise is sweet. They praise you in song.

Hero who gains (?) victories …… in greatness.
…… my king …….
Lord Ninŋišzida, your praise is sweet. They praise you in song.
…… in your elevated (?) house, …… life. Ninŋišzida, in your elevated (?) house, …… life. …… from the great place ……. …… throne-dais ……
